name: scout-search
description: Web search and content fetching: search, search_and_extract, fetch
author: inovacc

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search the web using Google, Bing, or DuckDuckGo and return structured SERP results

engine.description: search engine: google, bing, duckduckgo (default google)

tools.name: search_and_extract
tools.description: Search the web and extract full page content from top results in parallel

format.description: content format: markdown or text (default markdown)

tools.name: fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL and extract structured content (title, text, links, metadata)

format.description: output format: markdown, text, html (default markdown)

selector.description: CSS selector to extract specific content
